title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in the foreground, idle
scenario: App remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle soak test on Home Screen with paired headset
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the phone via the app.
3. Navigate to the app Home screen.
4. Leave the phone idle with the Poly Studio Mobile app in the foreground for multiple hours.
5. After the soak period, check that the app is still running, responsive, and not crashed.
expected: The app remains stable, running, and responsive after prolonged idle time with no crashes or memory leaks.
